title: Opticfy Client Research & Outreach Pipeline
description: 5-stage multi-agent sales pipeline: research → analysis → n8n workflow → presentation → outreach draft. Automates the entire Opticfy client acquisition workflow from company name to outreach-ready brief.
metric: Eliminates 4+ hours of manual prospect research per client
notes: Scored 8/10. Multi-agent orchestration pipeline actively used for Opticfy client acquisition. High SA hiring signal. Coding agent needed to add to site — deferred from tonight run (sub-agent limit hit). Process next run.

title: ConversationFirst — Agentforce UX Design Framework
description: Proprietary 4-part conversation design methodology for Agentforce deployments. Includes: Agent Persona Template (standardized pre-build doc), 3 Mermaid conversation flow diagrams (Customer Service, Lead Routing, HR Assist), 25-point Pre-Deploy UX Checklist, and shareable 1-pager methodology document. Targets high-demand skill gap in Agentforce consulting JDs.
decision: Added as methodology callout on Agentforce service card — not standalone portfolio card per JT decision

title: ConversationFirst — Agentforce UX Design Framework
description: A pre-deployment conversation design methodology for Agentforce agents. Includes: Agent Persona Card template, Mermaid flow diagrams for 3 use cases, 25-point Pre-Deploy UX Checklist, and shareable 1-page methodology document. Designed to position JT above typical Agentforce configurators.
metric: 4-artifact methodology framework applied to every Agentforce deployment
notes: Scored 6/10 — flag to JT. Fills conversation design skill gap flagged in Agentforce consulting JDs. Strong portfolio signal but not yet client-deployed.
